article.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Voice in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation define a distinctive sound.
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a prominent figure in the techno scene despite his young age. His Detroit roots are unmistakable, and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

Troxler's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These diverse inspirations contribute to his distinctive techno sound.

With much-anticipated and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, Troxler's work has garnered significant attention. Each release joins the dots of his evolving sound.

Recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
